title: adesmia neglecta
intro: Adesmia neglecta, also known as the "Neglected Pea Bush," is a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Adesmia neglecta include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Adesmia neglecta can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and resilience.
